User Story: As a student, I want to login via university ID so I can access my profile.
As a teacher, I want to view a real-time list of present students.
As a system, I want to detect if a student is within 10m of the classroom.
As a student, I want a notification when my attendance is marked.
As an admin, I want to manually override attendance for technical errors.
As a developer, I want to set up the database schema for student records.
As a designer, I want to create the wireframes for the attendance dashboard.
As a tester, I want to run GPS accuracy tests to verify the geo-fencing range.
As a student, I want to see my total attendance percentage on the home screen.
As a developer, I want to set up the API endpoints for the login system.
